problem id: b8e0c853
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  10101110 -> 01101101
  00100110 -> 00101101
  00010010 -> 10110110
  11000100 -> 00011111
  01100110 -> 00001111
  01001101 -> 11111011
  01001000 -> 11011011
  00100100 -> 01101101
  11000011 -> 01111110

query: 01001010
predicted answer: 10011010
